chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P No. 5079 of 2025 (Choudhry Fazal Haq V. Chairman PEMRA & Others) Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza Petitioner: Choudhry Fazal Haq, Through Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Shaikh, Advocate. Respondents No. 5 & 6: K-Electric & Another Through Mr. Mr. Muhammad Ali Lakhani, Advocate. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. Date of hearing: 07.11.2025 Date of Order: 07.11.2025. O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J. - Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the grievance of the petitioner has been redressed and therefore, he does not press the petition further. Petition disposed of accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
